goal: Add input validation to the /signup endpoint

contract.definition_of_done: POST /signup rejects a missing or invalid email with HTTP 400 + a JSON error body; no other endpoint changes.
constraints: do not touch any endpoint other than /signup

subject: did:web:titaniumcomputing.com:machine-driver

tasks.goal: Write a failing test: POST /signup with no email returns 400
Make /signup reject a missing email with 400 + a JSON error body
Make the new test pass; do not touch any other endpoint
